title: The Race Against the Cage — Part 2
description: Citizens, fighters, and the Straw Hat allies push back against the Birdcage as Luffy and Law continue the fight.
scene: On pages 11–15, Luffy, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Beee hehe he!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell is this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You fool! Don't for a second think that someone like you could ever defeat dofy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Doffy! I'll keep this one down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Damn it! Let me go, you bas- tard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Flatter Law's Head Now, while you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oi! Mingo! Don't even think about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Fight me! Traffy can't even move a millimeter anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This damn bastard is so clingy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I resent that...I'm sticky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: fwooh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's useless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Behehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What-!? What's going on!? If you're a logical user then I should be able to hit you with Busoshoku Haki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Am I really a logia? That won't work on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's use- less, you rubber freak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It really is pointless, Straw Hat- ya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: fighting against that papier-machine, shithead is futile.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I detested most the fact that if I sat on the heart seat, I would have been lumped in with buffoons like that guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I see you're still capable of moving your mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: MmmmmNNNNN NnNNNnnnNnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnn

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Sticky Stick Launcher!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: The top executives are the corner- stones of the family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I shall not tole- rate you belittling them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Quit It!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I told you, Traffy can't move anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Step aside, Doffy! I'm gonna teach that little shit some manners!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Listen up, law! Duffy shall always be the supreme king! However,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: When he is amongst us current top executives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Remember to be done in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: He is as one of us! That is because...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Some 30 years ago, we top executives... We found and took under our wings some- one of peerless potential...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: We four gave him power, we raised him... We groomed him into "evil's champion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You were almost killed in the the Holy Land Mariejois!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: And they killed your father as well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I can't believe you made it out of there alive. This is a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Doffy... you have what it takes to be a king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Doffy... We shall heed your every word.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: In return... show us your dreams!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Where'd you get that wound?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Some thugs assaulted me... I wish they'd just die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: under- stood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: The streets were poorly paved and so I tripped and fell...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The streets...!? Which town!? Where!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: know this, dofy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: You are a King.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: None shall stand before you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: You are the man that will one day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Rule as King of this Sea!

summary: This part focuses on the race against the cage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
